ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_share" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the data is recorded */,
  "total_market_share" TEXT /* Total market share percentage */,
  "ie8_share" TEXT /* Market share percentage of Internet Explorer 8 */,
  "ie7_share" TEXT /* Market share percentage of Internet Explorer 7 */,
  "ie6_share" TEXT /* Market share percentage of Internet Explorer 6 */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_share_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser version */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the web browser */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the browser */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the browser version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser version */,
  "market_share" TEXT /* Market share percentage for the browser version */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_data_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES browser_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the month falls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser */,
  "total_market_share" TEXT /* Total market share percentage for the browser */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_market_data_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browser_details ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_market_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_details" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the web browser */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the browser */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* End of life date for the browser */,
  "supported_platforms" TEXT /* List of supported platforms (e.g., Windows, macOS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES monthly_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "predicted_market_share" TEXT /* Predicted market share percentage */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the forecast (e.g., 95% CI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browser_details ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "data_source_table" TEXT /* Table from which the widget fetches data */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_layouts" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard layout */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the layout */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget included in the layout */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the widget in the layout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_layouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_layouts_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES dashboard_widgets ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)
